title: Pixel Consistent Ghast
description: Pack to make ghasts pixel consistent
body:
# Floofhips' HD Ghast Texture Pack

## What's This All About?
Hey kids, this resource pack by yours truly upscales the Ghast and Happy Ghast textures to give them a high-res makeover while keeping everything you love about the original design intact : )

## Compatibility
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.16 and up for Ghasts only
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.6 and up for Happy Ghasts too

So go ahead, download it!!!!
![Friends](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9RycSEF4/images/eaa09aac2e44273b7a2871f47caa6186a668e0b4.png)
